Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class BankRelationshipCreate

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.BankRelationshipCreate
public class BankRelationshipCreate extends Object
BankRelationshipCreate - A relationship between a bank account and an Apex account.
